name: $AREA-design calc
description: Non-plottable layer for design calculations and temporary geometry.

name: $AREA-design calc-T
description: Non-plottable text and labels for design calculations.

name: $NOPLOT
description: General purpose non-plottable layer for construction lines or helper objects.

name: $REV-GRAD-revision X or yymmdd whichever makes sense
description: Revision clouds and markers specific to grading changes.

name: $REV-UTIL-revision X or yymmdd whichever makes sense
description: Revision clouds and markers specific to utility changes.
Default layer; usage is generally discouraged in favor of specific layers.

name: 0riginal layer name -APPROX and -APPROX-T  create as needed
description: Placeholder for creating layers showing approximate locations of items.

name: ALN-BC-EC-T
description: Text labels for alignment geometry points like Begin Curve and End Curve.

name: ALN-CL
description: Proposed centerline geometry for roads, channels, or utility alignments.

name: ALN-OFFSET
description: Offset lines related to a primary alignment, such as right-of-way or construction limits.

name: ALN-SECTION
description: Sample lines used for generating cross-sections along an alignment.

name: ALN-STA-T
description: Major and minor stationing text labels for an alignment.

name: ALN-T
description: General text and labels associated with alignments, such as names or descriptions.

name: CORRIDOR
description: Civil 3D corridor objects and their associated linework.

name: CREEK-T
description: Text identifying creeks, rivers, or other natural watercourses.

name: Defpoints
description: System layer for definition points of dimensions; non-plottable.

name: DETAIL
description: General linework for standard construction details.

name: EX-CONT-MJR
description: Existing major elevation contours.

name: EX-CONT-MNR
description: Existing minor elevation contours.

name: EX-UTIL-raise
description: Indicates existing utility manholes or structures to be raised to new grade.

description: Notes and labels for existing utilities to be adjusted or raised.

name: FEATURELINE
description: Civil 3D feature lines used for grading design.

description: Placeholder for future improvements or phased construction elements.
